name: Nawi Brothers Group Ltd
summary: Nawi Brothers Group Ltd provides finance and non-bank credit services in Israel. The company's services include real estate initiative financing and completion of equity, import/suppliers financing, credit insurance for companies and businesses, financing for companies and businesses, equipment financing, financing against commercial checks, and bridging loans. Its customers cover corporations, companies, partnerships, licensed dealers, and businessmen in various industries. The company was formerly known as Golden Equity Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to Nawi Brothers Group Ltd in January 2011. Nawi Brothers Group Ltd was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
